Get monthly agricultural price index

Source: R/get_price_index_month.R
get_price_index_month.Rd

Fetches monthly price index data across five endpoints.

Primary search modes (choose one):

  • sector = TRUE — list all sectors

  • category_code — search by product category

  • group_code — search by product group

  • product_code — search by product name

  • year_th + month — fetch all commodities for a specific month (standalone)

Optional filters (combine with any primary mode):

  • year_th — filter by Thai Buddhist year (works with all endpoints including sector)

  • month — filter by month 1-12 (works with category, group, product)

  • year_th + month — filter by both year and month

Note: month cannot be used without a primary mode (category/group/product). For month-only filtering without a code, use year_th + month standalone mode.

Usage

get_price_index_month(
  category_code = NULL,
  group_code = NULL,
  product_code = NULL,
  year_th = NULL,
  month = NULL,
  sector = FALSE,
  api_key = NULL
)

Arguments

category_code

Category code (see show_index_categories(), e.g. "LIVESTOCK")

group_code

Group code (see show_index_groups(), e.g. "OIL_CROP")

product_code

Product code (see show_index_products(), e.g. "GARLIC_DRY_MIX")

year_th

Thai Buddhist year (e.g. 2567). Optional filter for any endpoint, or used with month for standalone /all mode.

month

Month as integer 1-12 (e.g. 1 or "01"). Optional filter for category/group/product endpoints; required with year_th for standalone /all mode.

sector

Logical. If TRUE, fetches the full sector reference list. Can be combined with year_th. Default: FALSE.

api_key

API key (if required)

Value

A data.frame of monthly price index records

Examples

# Get sector reference list
get_price_index_month(sector = TRUE)
#> Found 252 records (3 page(s)) — fetching...
#>   Fetching page 2 / 3
#>   Fetching page 3 / 3
#> Done. 252 records retrieved.
#>     year_th month product_sector product_category product_group       commod
